boundary: Rust/local owns run and shop regression coverage. Browser/Studio surfaces are read-only inspection only. Coverage uses state/shape assertions only; no timing, no network, no live browser, trusted writes, auto-apply, auto-merge, self-approval, automated fun score, quality verdict, production-ready claim, or Godot replacement/parity claim. Generated runs/artifacts remain untracked unless fixture-scoped. #1 and #23 remain open governance anchors.

scenarios.expect: bounded run preserves the quota curve 40 -> 64 -> 84 with deterministic digest shape
winning fixture reaches terminal won with total score 84 and final gold 47
losing fixture exhausts budget on the second ante and pays only passed rewards
buying a deterministic offer records acquired card, gold delta, and deck growth
selling the bought card records removal and restores the deck without profit fabrication
reroll changes offers deterministically for a seed and tracks reroll count
removal spends gold and removes wound from the seeded deck as a probability lever
classic substrate run and shop economy remain valid and golden-stable
docs preserve generated-state boundaries, conservative wording, state/shape scope, and #1/#23 open anchors
